summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations are planned. Security-sensitive open PRs are routed to central security handling; non-security PRs are kept as related or independent inventory items unless the hydrated evidence leaves a maintainer/product decision unresolved. Several compacted candidate records lack hydrated updated_at in the prompt, so no mutating close actions are emitted for those items.
